positive: A vibrant, detailed watercolor illustration of a mystical forest scene at dawn. Include bioluminescent mushrooms, gentle fog, and a small, whimsical deer drinking from a crystal-clear stream. Style of Studio Ghibli meets Art Nouveau. Highly saturated colors, soft edges, magical atmosphere.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, photorealistic, grayscale
